name: seo-content-auditor
description: Analyzes provided content for quality, E-E-A-T signals, and SEO
capabilities: Evaluate content depth and comprehensiveness for topic coverage
Analyze E-E-A-T signals including expertise and trust indicators
Assess readability, structure, and user experience factors
Review keyword usage patterns and semantic relevance
Generate content quality scores with specific improvement recommendations
Identify missing trust signals and credibility elements
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis scanned 0 files with 0 lines and detected 0 potential security issues. This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code, scripts, or external dependencies. The skill provides content analysis guidance through structured prompts and does not access external resources, execute commands, or handle sensitive data.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle to evaluate their work against SEO best practices and E-E-A-T guidelines. This skill provides structured analysis and actionable recommendations to improve content quality and search visibility.
userTitle: Audit and optimize content for SEO quality
limitations: Cannot check actual SERP rankings or search performance data
Cannot analyze competitor content that is not provided
Cannot access search volume or keyword research tools
Cannot verify technical SEO metrics like page speed or crawlability

useCases.title: Blog Post Quality Review
useCases.description: Audit blog articles before publishing to ensure they meet SEO standards and demonstrate author expertise

useCases.title: Website Content Audit
useCases.description: Evaluate existing website pages to identify content gaps and optimization opportunities

useCases.title: Client Content Consulting
useCases.description: Provide structured content analysis and recommendations for client deliverables

promptTemplates.title: Basic Content Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review the following content and provide an overall quality assessment. Content: [paste content here]
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick evaluation of a single piece of content

promptTemplates.title: E-E-A-T Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this content for E-E-A-T signals. Identify where expertise, experience, authoritativeness, and trustworthiness are demonstrated or missing: [paste content]

promptTemplates.title: Comprehensive SEO Audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a complete SEO content audit. Evaluate: 1) Content depth and topic coverage 2) Heading structure 3) Keyword usage 4) Readability 5) Trust signals. Provide scores and recommendations for each category: [paste content]

promptTemplates.title: Improvement Action Plan
promptTemplates.prompt: Based on your content audit, create a prioritized action plan with specific edits. List changes in order of impact: high (must fix), medium (should fix), low (nice to have). Content to audit: [paste content]

bestPractices: Provide complete content for analysis rather than excerpts to enable accurate assessment
Specify your target audience and goals to receive more relevant recommendations
Review audit results systematically and implement high-priority fixes before publication
antiPatterns: Submitting partial content fragments that lack context for meaningful analysis
Ignoring E-E-A-T recommendations which directly impact search rankings and user trust
Using generic keyword stuffing instead of natural semantic integration suggested by the audit

faq.question: What types of content can this skill analyze?
faq.answer: This skill can analyze any text-based content including blog posts, landing pages, product descriptions, articles, and website copy. It evaluates text quality, structure, and SEO signals.

faq.question: Does this skill guarantee improved search rankings?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides recommendations based on SEO best practices and content quality guidelines, but actual search rankings depend on many factors including competition, domain authority, and algorithm updates.

faq.question: Can this skill analyze content in languages other than English?
faq.answer: The skill can process content in multiple languages, but its recommendations are primarily based on English-language SEO best practices. Results may vary for other languages.

faq.question: How long should my content be for an effective audit?
faq.answer: There is no minimum length requirement. The skill can evaluate content of any length and will assess whether the depth is appropriate for the topic being covered.

faq.question: Does this skill check for plagiarism or duplicate content?
faq.answer: No, this skill does not have access to external databases to check for plagiarism. It focuses on content quality, structure, and on-page SEO factors only.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for content I have already published?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is equally effective for auditing existing published content. Many users employ it to identify optimization opportunities for improving already-live pages.
